CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT tcpPort() AS server_port, SUM(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY server_port;
SELECT tcpPort() FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table) AS distinct_ids;
SELECT (SELECT tcpPort() FROM test_table) AS nested_port, AVG(value) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table_shard (id UInt32, value UInt32) ENGINE = Distributed('cluster', 'test_table', id);
SELECT tcpPort(), COUNT() FROM test_table GROUP BY tcpPort();
SELECT COUNT(*), (SELECT tcpPort()) FROM test_table WHERE value > 150;
